policy_name: Care Health Care Senior (for Senior Citizens)

min_entry_age.source_quote: If your age is 61 years or more, we provide you an option to choose for co-payment of 20% per claim (senior-citizens product; min entry typically 61 years)

max_entry_age.source_quote: No upper entry age cap stated in brochure (senior-citizens plan; per policy schedule)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Waiting period 30 days for any illness except injury

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Waiting period for pre-existing illness 4 years of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Waiting period for named ailments 2 years of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity not applicable / not offered in senior-citizens plan (no maternity row in benefit table)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization & Post Hospitalization Up to SI, 30 days/60 days

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization & Post Hospitalization Up to SI, 30 days/60 days

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatments Up to SI, 541 Procedures

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Alternative Treatments Up to ` 15,000 / Up to ` 20,000 (AYUSH cover with cash sub-limit)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: No maternity benefit listed in Care Senior brochure benefit table

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Cover Up to ` 50,000 / Up to ` 1,00,000

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: No Claim Bonus 10% increase in SI per Policy Year in case of claim-free year; Max up to 50% of SI

restoration_benefit.value: Automatic Recharge of Sum Insured (once per policy year)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: Automatic Recharge of Sum Insured Yes to SI (Once in a Policy Year) / Yes, Up to SI (Once in a Policy Year)

room_rent_capping.value: 1% of SI per day (3 Lacs plan); Single Private AC Room with max 1% SI per day (5/7/10 Lacs plan)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Eligibility 1% SI per day / Single Private AC Room (Max. up to 1% of SI per day)

copayment_pct.source_quote: If your age is 61 years or more, we provide you an option to choose for co-payment of 20% per claim (over & above any other co-payment, If any) which applies to you.

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible in Care Senior

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Smart select a discount of 15% on premium payable ## Additional 20% Co-Pay applicable per claim if hospitalization done outside SMART SELECT network hospitals (cashless facility implied via network)

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

policy_type.source_quote: In-Patient Hospitalization Up to Sum Insured (indemnity-based senior citizens plan)

_meta.notes: Care Senior senior-citizens plan; brochure has clean benefit table. 4-year PED, 2-year named ailments, 20% mandatory copay age 61+.
